title: Leaders of Tomorrow by Icon
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical leaders of tomorrow by icon habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Leaders of Tomorrow by Icon helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn leaders of tomorrow by icon into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through OBJECTIVE: Influencing vs. Instructing, OBJECTIVE: The Heart vs. The Head, and OBJECTIVE: Long Term vs. Short Term so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: OBJECTIVE: The Heart vs. The Head
OBJECTIVE: Long Term vs. Short Term
OBJECTIVE: Strategic Planning vs. Tactical Planning

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
